title: Bright 3 BHK in Gachibowli Near DLF Cyber City
description: A well-maintained 3 BHK flat on the 8th floor of a gated community, just 10 minutes from DLF Cyber City and IIIT Hyderabad. The apartment faces the central garden, making it bright throughout the day. The fully equipped kitchen includes a refrigerator, microwave, and all crockery. Both bedrooms come with queen-size beds, wardrobes, and individual air conditioning. The living area has a large Smart TV. Society amenities include a swimming pool, gym, and children's play area. All utilities are managed by Nivaas — one call resolves everything.

title: Cosy 2 BHK in Madhapur Walking Distance to Cyber Towers
description: This 2 BHK apartment sits in a quiet lane off the main Madhapur road, making it ideal for professionals at Cyber Towers, Google, or Facebook offices nearby. The apartment is fully furnished — sofa, dining table, beds with storage, wardrobes, and a well-stocked kitchen. Both rooms have air conditioning. The building has 24-hour water supply, power backup, and a dedicated parking bay. Nivaas handles all maintenance requests within 24 hours so you can focus on work.

title: Spacious 2 BHK in Kondapur Near Botanical Gardens
description: Located minutes from Kondapur's IT hubs and the peaceful Botanical Gardens, this semi-furnished 2 BHK offers generous room sizes that are less common at this price point. The modular kitchen comes fully fitted with a chimney and hob. Wardrobes are built into all bedrooms. Nivaas furnishes and manages this home — tenants need to bring only personal items and a laptop. The building is in a quiet gated layout with reliable water and power. Super market, pharmacies, and restaurants are all within a 5-minute walk.

title: Premium 3 BHK in HITEC City Near Mindspace
description: One of Nivaas's flagship homes — a 1,850 sq ft 3 BHK on the 14th floor of a premium tower within walking distance of Mindspace HITEC City. The apartment is kitted out with high-quality furnishings including a king-size bed in the master bedroom, two twin beds in the second room, and a sofa set that seats six. A dedicated home office corner with ergonomic chair and broadband makes it ideal for hybrid workers. The building's amenities — rooftop pool, gym with modern equipment, cafeteria — are consistently maintained. Nivaas takes a security deposit and handles everything else.

title: Contemporary 2 BHK in Financial District Near Nanakramguda
description: A 2 BHK apartment in the rapidly growing Financial District, one of Hyderabad's most professionally active corridors. The Deloitte and Accenture campuses are a 7-minute drive; Amazon and Microsoft offices in Nanakramguda are even closer. The apartment is fully furnished with contemporary furniture and has strong natural light from east-facing windows. The kitchen is equipped with a refrigerator, microwave, and induction cooktop. Nivaas manages this property directly and ensures a 24-hour response for any maintenance issue. Ideal for two working professionals or a small family.
